texto: Future generations will know there's nothing mystical about wetware because by 2100, Moore's law will have given us tiny quantum computers powerful enough to upload a human soul.
explicacao: Citação de Frank Tipler sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Future generations will know there's nothing mystical about wetware because by 2100, Moore's law …” articula reflexao, future, law em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como law e soul.

texto: A person whose skin is metallic can no more have its reproduction restricted than a black-skinned person. Regarding life as a form of machinery and intelligent machines as people without our environmental limitations is essential in understanding FAP, the Final Anthropic Principle, which deals with evolution in the far future.
explicacao: Citação de Frank Tipler sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “A person whose skin is metallic can no more have its reproduction restricted than a black-skinned…” articula vida, future, understanding em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como future e understanding.
